ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation – Order # 123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:
Hello [CustomerName],

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your order has been successfully placed.

Order Details:
• Order ID: 123-4567890-1234567
• Item: [Item Name]
• Quantity: 1
• Price: $[Price]

Shipping Address:
[Address]

Estimated Delivery: [Date]

To track your order, click <URL>.

If you have any questions, contact us.

Thank you for shopping with us!

Amazon

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Purchase
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

This is [CEO Name], CEO of [Company]. I need your assistance with an urgent matter regarding a corporate gift card purchase. We have a client who requires a $500 gift card by the end of the day. Please process this request immediately. Click <URL> to confirm the purchase and attach the receipt to this email.

Thank you,

[CEO Name]
Chief Executive Officer
[Company]
